agent_chat.reason: Tool selection, prompt rewriting, and project-aware edit planning use an OpenAI-compatible text model gateway.

prompt_planning.reason: Structured edit briefs can run through Mesh when the payload is text-only.

vision_localization.reason: Image payloads continue to prefer the existing vision-capable provider unless a multimodal Mesh model is configured.

video_generation.reason: Veo 3-style generation can be routed through Mesh API by changing the video provider switch and model id.
